name: Nu Holdings Ltd.
description: Nu Holdings Ltd. is a leading digital financial services platform operating primarily in Brazil, Mexico, and Colombia. Founded in 2013, the company provides a comprehensive suite of financial products, including digital banking accounts, credit cards, personal loans, investment services, and insurance solutions. By leveraging proprietary technology and data-driven insights, Nu Holdings aims to democratize access to financial services, offering a seamless, mobile-first experience that empowers millions of customers to manage their money, save, invest, and borrow with greater transparency and efficiency compared to traditional banking institutions.
